prestazioni: Engine: SR20DET-R (Group A homologation spec) with forged internals including Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 2.2L stroker crankshaft for a 2.2L displacement. Turbocharger upgraded to a Garrett GT35R with a 0.82 A/R turbine housing and 57mm compressor wheel, paired with a Tomei M82 cast manifold and 3-inch stainless steel downpipe.

Fuel System: Full race-spec fuel setup with dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Tomei adjustable fuel pressure regulator. ECU reflashed with Haltech Elite 2500 standalone management, tuned for 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) boost with a 3000rpm launch control limiter and anti-lag system using a GReddy electronic boost controller.

Drivetrain & Chassis: OS Giken 2-way limited-slip differential with 4.375 final drive ratio, reinforced with a Cusco 1.5-way LSD cover. Transmission upgraded with a PPG straight-cut dog engagement gearset (1st-4th) and a Tilton twin-plate ceramic clutch. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins DFV Road & Track coilovers (adjustable damping, 20-way rebound, 12-way compression), polyurethane bushings from SuperPro, and a Cusco front strut tower bar with integrated brace.
estetica: Body Kit: Rocket Bunny V1 GTI-R widebody kit with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser. Front bumper modified with a custom aluminum splitter and canards from APR Performance, paired with a carbon fiber hood featuring a functional NACA duct for intercooler cooling.

Aerodynamics: Custom rear wing based on the Nissan R32 GT-R Group A design, fabricated from carbon fiber with adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees) and integrated Gurney flap. Side skirts replaced with carbon fiber units from Seibon, featuring integrated air curtains for brake cooling. Underbody aero includes a full-length aluminum belly pan with vortex generators.

Interior & Details: Full custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (FIA-spec, 8-point with door bars), wrapped in Alcantara. Dashboard replaced with a carbon fiber unit from Varis, housing a Motec C127 digital dash and AEM X-Series gauges. Seats swapped for Bride Zeta IV recliners with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Exterior color: Nissan Racing Division Bayside Blue with matte black accents and JDM-spec Nismo decals.
